entries.label: Version 1
entries.prompt:
Recreate the same solutions template page layout used for "Crypto Commerce":
1. Hero card (rounded, soft accent-tinted background): back link "← Back to solutions", small uppercase eyebrow label, large bold H1 headline, one-paragraph subtext.
2. "The Risk" section (two columns, light grey background): left has label "THE RISK", a large bold stat, and a short paragraph; right has a rounded accent-tinted callout card with a short bold centered uppercase phrase.
3. "Key benefits" section (white background): H2 "Key benefits", grid of rounded light-grey cards (2 per row), each with a bold title and short description.
4. Closing CTA section (light grey background): centered H2 question with a solid accent-colored button beneath.
5. Footer: centered copyright line.

Content to use:
- Eyebrow label: STABLECOIN MERCHANT PAYMENTS
- H1: Drop into existing stablecoin payment rails — without disruption.
- Subtext: Wallet Nation adds non-custodial payment protection directly into existing stablecoin merchant rails — with no wallet migration, no new custody arrangements, and no changes to your core stack.
- Risk label: THE RISK
- Risk stat: Zero migration
- Risk paragraph: Merchants adopting stablecoin payments often face a choice between speed and protection. Wallet Nation removes that trade-off by introducing conditional settlement without requiring new wallets or custodial accounts.
- Callout box text: RAIL COMPATIBILITY
- Key benefit 1 — No wallet migration: Existing merchant wallets stay exactly as they are. Wallet Nation adds protection at the settlement layer, not the wallet layer.
- Key benefit 2 — No new custody: Funds are never held by Wallet Nation. Protection is enforced through cryptographic control, not a custodial account.
- Key benefit 3 — No stack changes: Integrate alongside current payment infrastructure — no re-platforming, no new rails, no customer re-education.
- CTA headline: Ready to protect your merchant payment rails?
- Button text: Talk to us
